failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and synthesized an answer inconsistent with the returned evidence.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer the catalog query using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool call was made correctly and returned 2 matching available bagged Vacuum Cleaner items with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At index 4, the Executor had this tool output available but produced an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, which contradicts the tool result and invents unsupported details. The later Evaluator did not resolve the error; it approved the incorrect answer.
